facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 1,240 reviews. At a bistro inside Chợ đêm Vuifest.

Cái Mâm Bistro is not an accident. That rating holds because the food earns it, night after night, in one of Sunset Town's busiest market strips.

If you're hitting Phú Quốc and skipping the night market scene, you're leaving the best meals on the table.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walk into Chợ đêm Vuifest, find Cái Mâm Bistro, order everything. 4.7 stars across 1,240 reviews tells you exactly what to expect. Don't overthink it.
